article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures and his release of a comprehensive sample pack.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry.
His production style is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, reflecting a distinct approach within electronic music.
Noizekid has worked with well-known artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, contributing to a range of notable projects.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used across various tracks.
His work is further contextualized by associations with similar artists including ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
